title: High CPU Usage Remediation Runbook
solution: 1. Identify top processes (top -bn1). 2. Check for runaway processes. 3. If application process, restart service. 4. If system process, investigate and adjust resource limits. 5. Scale horizontally if sustained load.

title: Disk Space Cleanup Runbook
solution: 1. Check disk usage (df -h). 2. Find large files (find / -size +100M). 3. Compress old logs. 4. Remove temp files. 5. Configure log rotation. 6. Expand volume if needed.

title: Memory Leak Investigation & Fix Runbook
solution: 1. Capture heap dump. 2. Analyze memory allocation patterns. 3. Restart service with increased memory. 4. Enable GC logging. 5. File bug for development team.

title: Database Connection Pool Reset Runbook
solution: 1. Check active connections (pg_stat_activity). 2. Kill idle connections. 3. Restart connection pool. 4. Tune pool settings (max_connections, idle_timeout). 5. Monitor for connection leaks.

title: SSL Certificate Renewal Runbook
solution: 1. Check certificate expiry (openssl s_client). 2. Trigger cert-manager renewal. 3. If auto-renewal fails, manually request new certificate. 4. Install and verify new certificate. 5. Update monitoring.

title: Brute Force Attack Response Runbook
solution: 1. Identify attacking IPs from auth.log. 2. Block IPs in firewall (iptables/WAF). 3. Rotate affected credentials. 4. Enable account lockout policy. 5. Review and harden SSH config.

title: API Performance Degradation Runbook
solution: 1. Check application logs for errors. 2. Review recent deployments. 3. Test dependent services. 4. Check database query performance. 5. Restart application if regression found. 6. Rollback deployment if needed.

title: Network Latency Spike Response Runbook
solution: 1. Run traceroute to identify bottleneck. 2. Check interface error counters. 3. Failover to redundant path if available. 4. Contact network team for hardware check. 5. Monitor after failover.

title: Kubernetes Pod CrashLoopBackOff Runbook
solution: 1. Check pod logs (kubectl logs). 2. Describe pod for events. 3. If OOMKilled, increase memory limits. 4. If error exit, check application logs. 5. Restart pod with updated config.

title: Log Volume Anomaly Investigation Runbook
solution: 1. Identify error patterns in logs. 2. Check for recent config changes. 3. Review application dependencies. 4. Restart affected service. 5. Enable debug logging temporarily for investigation.

title: Abnormal End (ABEND) Recovery Runbook
solution: 1. Fetch crash dump and exit code. 2. Restart target service. 3. Perform buffer cleanup. 4. Release file locks. 5. Verify service health.
